prompt: Enhance color intensity based on texture slope from the gradient reference.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1 (the gray sphere). Apply colors to the sphere, where the vividness or saturation of these colors is directly guided by the brightness levels in image 2 (the gradient reference). Specifically, regions on the sphere that align with brighter areas in image 2 should display significantly enhanced color intensity, while regions aligning with darker areas in image 2 should have reduced or muted color intensity.
objects: regions of enhanced color intensity on the sphere
regions of muted color intensity on the sphere
